title: funky gadgets Double Duvet Cover Set Charcoal – Soft Brushed Microfiber Plain Dyed Duvet Cover Sets with Pillowcases - Bedding Quilt Cover Set.
features: DUVET COVER- Includes 1 Charcoal Duvet Cover Set with 2 pillowcases measures 50x75 cm with button closure.
BRUSHED MICROFIBER – The brushed microfiber fabric of double duvet cover is 100% Polyester makes duvet cover sets exceptionally soft, smooth Breathable.
COLOUR: Charcoal double duvet set; An Ideal bedding double bed set for Bedroom Décor.

The fabric is (OEKO-TEX certified) hypoallergenic and skin-friendly, making it ideal for those who suffer from allergies. Give your bedroom an instant luxurious touch. Suitable for bedrooms kids’ room, & guest rooms.
CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Our duvet cover sets are machine-washable at a low temperature (up to40°c), Air dry or tumble dried and iron on low heat. Do not Bleach.
description: Product Description Funky Gadgets Brushed Microfiber (90GSM ) Duvet Cover Sets. Microfiber bedding duvet covers are known for being extremely soft, offering a luxurious feel that is both comfortable and breathable. Previous page Next page Reversible bedding Duvet Cover Sets Previous page Next page Charcoal Bedding Duvet Cover Hidden Button Closure A hidden button closure in a pillowcase secures the pillow discreetly, maintaining a smooth exterior and providing comfort. Super soft, Breathable A super soft microfiber duvet cover offers luxurious comfort, durability, and easy maintenance. Its smooth texture ensures a cozy night's sleep. Elegent Pillow cases The package includes a super soft microfiber duvet cover and matching pillowcase with fine stitching , offering elegant bedroom setup. Plain dyed quilt cover It provides a clean and classic look that can effortlessly blend with various bedroom decor styles. Care Instruction Ordinary washers and dryers can be used for easy care and washing of this set. Hand or machine wash with detergent. Do not bleach.
